## **Bugs and stability** {#theme-bugs_stability}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      7 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: May 1, 2026 - Jul 1, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Jenniina Tuuliainen_, May 20, 2026, 1/5: "this is the crashiest app to date. Crashes more than an american driver. If it gets even more laggy after the update i am going back to using Snapchat."
            2. _Luffe DeluXe_, May 9, 2026, 1/5: "This app is only getting more and more unstable and unusable, you're seriously sinking your own ship..."
            3. _Essi Sojakka_, May 1, 2026, 1/5: "Keeps crashing. Have done all the problem solving steps. Still crashes. After their answer since they don't know how to read... I DID ALL THAT ALREADY!"

## **Sync and accounts** {#theme-sync_accounts}

   **Sync and accounts.**
      1 recent review(s) mention sync and accounts.
      Review window: Jul 13, 2026 - Jul 13, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users mention sync, backup, login, or accounts. This points to trust and cross-device workflow expectations.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Eleonora Contini_, Jul 13, 2026, 1/5: "my account was unfairly banned recently (due to the bugs that are happening) and I messaged them on Twitter (or I spent a lot of money on my Discord account and so far they haven't even given me the option to get my money back."
